title: rosa tomentosa subsp. micrantha
intro: Rosa tomentosa subsp. micrantha, also known as the 'Small-flowered Downy Rose', is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa tomentosa subsp. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, as well as its potential to treat wounds and skin conditions. Rosa tomentosa subsp. micrantha is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent.
